name: robyn
description: Robyn — turns your calendar, contracts and transcripts into invoices in Xero.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "pnpm --filter robyn-api dev" "pnpm --filter robyn-web dev"
scripts.openapi: pnpm --filter robyn-api openapi && pnpm --filter robyn-web gen:types
scripts.build: pnpm --filter robyn-api build && pnpm --filter robyn-web build
